iEdison Description: Unique code assigned to the reporting organisation by NIST
Transformation Notes: Store as a custom metadata / org-level setting. Not a per-record field.

iEdison Description: Title as it appears in the invention report
Date of initial disclosure (MM/DD/YYYY)
Transformation Notes: Convert Salesforce Date to MM/DD/YYYY string

iEdison Description: Inventor first name
Transformation Notes: Traverse TTS_Inventor__c.techstarter__IP_Contribution__c → TTS_Inventor__c.techstarter__IP_Original_Inventor_Name__c → Contact.FirstName

iEdison Description: Inventor last name
Transformation Notes: Same traversal as firstName

iEdison Description: Middle name or first initial
Transformation Notes: Optional; same traversal

iEdison Description: true if inventor is a federal government employee
Transformation Notes: No federal employee flag on TTS_Inventor__c or Contact. New field needed on Inventor.

iEdison Description: Federal agency the inventor works for (if fedEmployee = true)
Transformation Notes: No agency field on Inventor or Contact. New field needed on Inventor.

iEdison Description: Primary federal agency designated for this invention
Transformation Notes: Required per inventor. No agency assignment field in TTS. May default to the fundingAgreements agency if only one funder.

iEdison Description: Federal agency making the award (e.g. NIH / NSF / DOD)
Transformation Notes: TTS only has a checkbox (techstarter__IP_Sponsored_Program__c) and free-text. A structured Funding Agreement object is needed.

iEdison Description: Grant or contract number from the federal award
Transformation Notes: Same gap as agency above. No grant number field exists on Technology.

iEdison Description: Prime Award or Sub-Award
Transformation Notes: Dependent on new Funding Agreement object.

iEdison Description: Agreement type (Grant, Contract, Cooperative Agreement, Other Funding Agreement)
Transformation Notes: Dependent on new Funding Agreement object.

iEdison Description: Additional grant/contract number for subcontracts
Transformation Notes: No subcontract structure in TTS. Dependent on Funding Agreement object.

iEdison Description: Subcontractor name
Transformation Notes: If subcontractor is an Account in Salesforce; requires link from Funding Agreement to Account.

iEdison Description: Unique Entity Identifier (UEI) of subcontractor
Transformation Notes: No UEI field on Account in TTS.

iEdison Description: Subcontractor city
Transformation Notes: Standard Account field.

iEdison Description: Subcontractor state code (2-char)
Transformation Notes: May need mapping to 2-char state abbreviation.

iEdison Description: Subcontractor country
Transformation Notes: Must match iEdison country name list (Section 12.4).

iEdison Description: Internal reference number for tracking the invention
Transformation Notes: Can also use a dedicated new field (techstarter__iEdison_Docket_Number__c) to avoid collision with other external refs.

iEdison Description: Auto-generated iEdison identifier returned after creation
Transformation Notes: iEdison generates this on create. Must be written back to the TTS record. Dedicated storage field recommended (see Gap Candidates).

iEdison Description: iEdison report number of the parent invention (if this is a child)
Transformation Notes: Requires the parent Technology record to also have its iEdison report number stored.

iEdison Description: Date of first public disclosure (MM/DD/YYYY)
Transformation Notes: Convert Salesforce Date to MM/DD/YYYY string.

iEdison Description: Keywords for categorising the invention
Transformation Notes: No keyword/tag field in TTS. Could derive from Technology Category picklist as a stopgap.

iEdison Description: True if the funding agreement falls under Bayh-Dole exceptional circumstances
Transformation Notes: No equivalent in TTS. New checkbox field needed on Technology.

iEdison Description: Budget identifier list for the report
Transformation Notes: No budget ID field in TTS.

iEdison Description: Up to 3 additional institution codes granted view-only access
Transformation Notes: Configuration-level setting; not per-record.

iEdison Description: Title election status: Under Evaluation, Elect to Retain Title, Does Not Retain Title, etc.
Transformation Notes: Critical Bayh-Dole compliance field. No equivalent in TTS. New picklist field needed on Technology.

iEdison Description: Date of title election (auto-generated for org clients)
Transformation Notes: New date field needed on Technology. Auto-populated by iEdison on org submissions.

iEdison Description: Reason for not retaining title (see iEdison Section 12.7): Low Commercial Potential, Budget Limitation, Other, etc.
Transformation Notes: New picklist field needed on Technology.

iEdison Description: Custom reason text when notElectTitleReason = Other
Transformation Notes: New text field on Technology (dependent on notElectTitleReason).

iEdison Description: Agency-controlled disposition: Government Retains Rights, Does Not Retain Rights, Assignment Approved, etc.
Transformation Notes: Set by federal agency. TTS does not supply; may store as read-only if syncing responses.

iEdison Description: Date of disposition decision (agency sets this)
Transformation Notes: Same as dispositionStatus — agency-controlled.

iEdison Description: Free-text notes about the invention for the agency
Transformation Notes: Could be sourced from Technology description fields or a dedicated Notes object. No direct mapping exists.

iEdison Description: Organisation name (deprecated — system uses institutionCode)
Transformation Notes: Deprecated field; populate from org name if needed.

iEdison Description: DOE S-number (agency users only; ignored for org submissions)
Transformation Notes: Ignored for institution submissions.
